opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Spouse reports] She is burning up, her heart is beating out of her chest, she won't stop sweating, and she's screaming at people who aren't there!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Extremely high fever, racing heart, and severe, aggressive confusion in a patient with a known thyroid condition.

symptom_narrative.onset: abrupt onset over the past 24 hours
symptom_narrative.character: high fever, racing heart 'going to explode', severe agitation progressing to hallucinations
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — patient pacing frantically, unable to follow commands
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profuse sweating, severe nausea, multiple episodes of severe diarrhoea, hallucinating (seeing/hearing things that aren't there)
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known history of hyperthyroidism (Graves' disease); stopped anti-thyroid medication and beta-blocker one month ago; recent cough suggesting a chest infection
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: pacing frantically, highly agitated, unable to follow commands

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present and struggling to keep her calm and safe at home

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: spouse frightened, wants clear direction on what to do
